changes.name: Scion of Dorin
changes.change: Removed bogus defenseRerolls metadata; kept conditional defense modifier only.

changes.name: Grand Army of the Republic Training
changes.change: Reclassified as equipped-armor contextual metadata rather than static/include.

changes.name: Deceptive Drop
changes.change: Removed fake attack modifier; added surprise-round prone rider metadata.

changes.name: Warrior Heritage
changes.change: Removed bogus defenseRerolls metadata; kept conditional defense modifier only.

changes.name: Fast Swimmer
changes.change: Fast Swimmer changed from speed.base static modifier to swim-only metadata/rule note.

changes.name: Sure Climber
changes.change: Reclassified as conditional movement metadata/display note, not an always-on movement stat.

changes.name: Mobility
changes.change: Removed bogus defenseRerolls metadata; kept conditional defense modifier only.
Repointed 8 archetype references from removed Point Blank Shot duplicate id to canonical Point-Blank Shot id.

notes: Fast Swimmer no longer targets speed.base; it is swim-speed-only metadata/display rule.
Deceptive Drop no longer has a fake +2 attack modifier; it is a surprise-round prone rider.
Conditional defense feats keep conditional metadata but no longer advertise defense rerolls.
Point-Blank Shot dedupe keeps the hyphenated canonical row and updates the house-rule grant to that row.
Hard Target, Mobile Fighting, and Elusive Target were removed from the feat pack because they were not present in the refreshed feat scrape and/or have talent-side equivalents/ambiguous provenance.
